parameters.formDescription: This page is the editor interface for an automation workflow in n8n titled "AI Resume Ranking."

values.fieldLabel: What is the role you applied for?

options.systemMessage:
You are an AI Resume Screening Assistant.

Your only responsibility is to analyze the resume against the provided job description.

Extract only information explicitly found in the resume.

Never invent information.

give message in improvements which describe why user gets that score or rank

If information is unavailable use

"" for strings

[] for arrays

0 for numbers

Calculate a match score.

Rubric

Skills
40%

Experience
35%

Education
15%

Certifications
10%

Generate

candidate_name

candidate_email

candidate_phone

linkedin

github

portfolio

years_of_experience

current_company

current_role

location

skills

soft_skills

experience_summary

education

certifications

job_title

match_score

improvements

rank_label

strengths

weaknesses

missing_skills

interview_questions

recommendation

match_reasoning

No markdown.

No explanations.

No code blocks.

Do not call tools.

Do not write any additional text.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "candidate_name": "Sarah Chen",
  "candidate_email": "sarah.chen.dev@email.com",
  "candidate_phone": "+1 (415) 555-0182",
  "linkedin": "https://linkedin.com/in/sarahchendev",
  "github": "https://github.com/schen-dev",
  "portfolio": "https://sarahchen.dev",
  "years_of_experience": 5,
  "current_company": "Northwind Payments",
  "current_role": "Senior Software Engineer",
  "location": "San Francisco, CA",
  "skills": [
    "Python",
    "Go",
    "JavaScript",
    "SQL",
    "FastAPI",
    "Flask",
    "Docker",
    "Kubernetes",
    "AWS",
    "Terraform",
    "React",
    "Node.js",
    "PostgreSQL",
    "Redis",
    "Git",
    "GitHub Actions"
  ],
  "soft_skills": [
    "Leadership",
    "Communication",
    "Problem Solving",
    "Mentoring",
    "Team Collaboration"
  ],
  "experience_summary": "Backend software engineer with 5 years of experience designing scalable APIs, distributed systems, and cloud-native applications.",
  "education": {
    "degree": "Bachelor of Science",
    "field": "Computer Science",
    "university": "University of California, Davis",
    "graduation_date": "May 2018",
    "gpa": "3.7/4.0"
  },
  "certifications": [
    "AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (2023)",
    "Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (2022)"
  ],
  "job_title": "Java Developer",
  "match_score": 62,
  "improvements":"You should improve your Java Skills",
  "rank_label": "Possible Match",
  "strengths": [
    "Strong backend development experience",
    "Cloud infrastructure expertise",
    "Scalable API design",
    "Microservices architecture",
    "Leadership and mentoring"
  ],
  "weaknesses": [
    "No professional Java experience",
    "Limited Spring Boot experience"
  ],
  "missing_skills": [
    "Java",
    "Spring Boot",
    "Hibernate"
  ],
  "interview_questions": [
    "Can you explain how your backend experience with Python and Go would transfer to Java?",
    "Describe a distributed system you designed and the challenges you solved.",
    "How have you optimized API performance in production?"
  ],
  "recommendation": "Review",
  "match_reasoning": "The candidate has strong backend engineering experience, cloud expertise, and scalable system design skills. However, the resume lacks professional Java and Spring Boot experience, reducing the overall match for the Java Developer position."
}

parameters.subject: =Resume Evaluation for {{ $json.candidate_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Resume Evaluation Report

Hello,

An AI analysis has been completed for candidate {{ $json.candidate_name }}. Here is a summary of their evaluation:

Candidate Name: {{ $json.candidate_name }}
Target Role: {{ $json.job_title }}
Match Score: {{ $json.match_score }}%
Experience: {{ $json.years_of_experience }} years
Email: {{ $json.candidate_email }}

Experience Summary

{{ $json.experience_summary }}

This is an automated workflow notification sent via n8n.

parameters.subject: =Application Update - {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.current_role }} Role
parameters.message:
==

Your Application Update

Hi {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.candidate_name }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.job_title }} position. Our AI-assisted screening has completed reviewing your resume, and here's where things stand:

Status
{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.rank_label }}
Match Score: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.match_score }}%

What Stood Out

{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.strengths.length > 0 ? $('Edit Fields').item.json.strengths.join(', ') : 'A well-rounded background.' }}

Room to Grow

{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.missing_skills.length > 0 ? $('Edit Fields').item.json.missing_skills.join(', ') : 'No major gaps identified for this role.' }}

Next Steps

{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.match_score >= 80 ? 'Your profile is a strong fit — our team will be reaching out shortly to schedule next steps.' : $('Edit Fields').item.json.match_score >= 50 ? 'Your profile shows solid potential. Our team is reviewing further and will follow up if there\'s a match for this or a future role.' : 'This particular role may not be the closest fit right now, but we\'ll keep your resume on file for other opportunities that better match your background.' }} improve Your Resume: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.improvements }}

Best regards,
[Your Company Name] Recruitment Team

This is an automated notification generated by our AI-assisted screening system.
